summary: Full-stack web application for Salad Khatora, a salad business management system. Features include: (1) Inventory management with ingredient tracking (name, quantity, unit, cost, supplier, low-stock threshold) and automatic value calculation. (2) Menu management for salad bowls (250gm, 350gm, 500gm) with recipe-to-ingredient mapping that auto-deducts inventory on sales. (3) Billing system for generating invoices with customer details, items, pricing, discounts, payment mode, and date. (4) Dashboard showing daily/weekly/monthly sales, profit calculations, top-selling bowls, and low-stock alerts. (5) Subscription management for weekly (6 days) and monthly (24 days) plans with customer details, dates, pricing, payment status, and expiry alerts (2 days before end). (6) In-app alert system (bell icon) for low inventory and subscription expiry notifications. (7) Admin authentication using Internet Identity (passkeys, social logins). (8) Customer database with name, mobile, email, reference, preferences, and address. (9) Reporting with CSV export for sales and inventory. (10) Mobile-friendly UI with white and green theme.
architectural_notes: Recipe-to-ingredient mapping system required for automatic inventory deduction on sales
Cost tracking system needed to calculate profit (selling price vs cost price)
Subscription expiry alert system triggers 2 days before end date
Internet Identity integration for secure admin authentication
In-app notification system (bell icon) for alerts, no external email/SMS
known_issues: Customer management form not allowing user to add customer details - UI/functionality issue

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication for admin login with secure session management
Create inventory management system with fields for ingredient name, current quantity (in grams or kg), unit type (grams/kg), cost price per unit, supplier name, and low-stock threshold
Implement automatic calculation of total inventory value based on ingredient quantities and cost prices
Create menu management for salad bowls with three sizes: 250gm, 350gm, and 500gm, where each bowl recipe is linked to specific ingredient quantities

Implement billing and sales system to generate invoices with customer name, phone number, items ordered, quantity, price, discount, payment mode, and date, with automatic inventory deduction based on recipe mapping
Create dashboard showing daily, weekly, and monthly sales with filtering options
Implement profit calculation on dashboard based on cost price (from ingredients) versus selling price (from invoices)
Display top-selling salad bowls on dashboard with sales count and revenue
Implement subscription management module for weekly (6 days/week) and monthly (24 days/month) plans with customer details, plan type, start date, end date, bowl size, price, and payment status
Create in-app notification system with bell icon displaying alerts for low inventory (below threshold) and subscriptions ending within 2 days
Create customer database with fields for name, mobile number, email, reference source, preferences, and address
Implement CSV export functionality for sales reports and inventory reports
Design mobile-friendly UI with white and green color scheme suitable for a small food business owner
Replace the placeholder CustomersPage with a functional customer management interface that displays a list of existing customers and provides an 'Add Customer' button to open a form dialog
Create a CustomerForm component with fields for name, mobile number, email, reference source, preferences, and address, using react-hook-form for validation and state management
Create a CustomerList component that displays customer cards in a grid layout showing name, mobile, email, and action buttons for editing
Add React Query hooks for customer data fetching and mutations (useCustomers, useAddCustomer, useUpdateCustomer) in useQueries.ts

new_feature_requests.summary: Inventory management system with ingredient tracking and automatic value calculation
Menu management with salad bowl sizes (250gm, 350gm, 500gm) and recipe-to-ingredient mapping
Billing and sales system with invoice generation and automatic inventory deduction
Dashboard with sales analytics, profit calculations, top-selling bowls, and low-stock alerts
Subscription management for weekly and monthly plans with expiry alerts
In-app alert system (bell icon) for low inventory and subscription notifications
Customer database with contact details, preferences, and address
CSV export functionality for sales and inventory reports
Mobile-friendly UI with white and green theme
Add backend CRUD operations for customer management including addCustomer, updateCustomer, deleteCustomer, and getCustomers functions in the main actor
